and-952920+6706402 or 826821+5751235 o=P end end end end end end end end end R=#e return Z(g)end,function(k,H)local Z=d(H)local C=function(C,W,e,J)return R(k,{C,W;e,J},H,Z)end return C end,function(k)local H,R=429656+-429655,k[71589+-71588]while R do I[R],H=I[R]-(379849-379848),(-694796-(-694797))+H if I[R]==-234943-(-234943)then I[R],m[R]=nil,nil end R=k[H]end end return(f(4172149-(-135195),{}))(Z(g))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[H(-455072-(-494008))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
